headline: Q4 Earnings Highlights: Textron (NYSE:TXT) Vs The Rest Of The Aerospace Stocks
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Textron (NYSE:TXT) and the rest of the aerospace stocks fared in Q4.
